pageContext.name: Donald with Chip and Dale
pageContext.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Always causing trouble, the mischievous chipmunk brothers Chip and Dale horseplay with Donald Duck in this playful Disney collectible by Jim Shore. Blowing a raspberry, one of the chipmunks teases from a branch while the other rides the grumpy duck's head.
